Title: fed — collaborative text editor

URL Source: https://fed.run/

Warning: This page maybe not yet fully loaded, consider explicitly specify a timeout.

Markdown Content:
a shared-text editor for small rooms

create a room, share the link, and everyone types into the same document at once.

supports Rust and Markdown.

## create room

choose a starter and get an invite link immediately.

rooms stay alive while participants are still in them, then clean up shortly after the last person leaves.
